reviewer: scrutiny-validator (self-review, subagent failed due to permissions)

codeQuality.notes: Well-structured auto-naming logic with proper guard conditions (user rename blocks, disabled check, in-progress lock). DB migration for name_source column handled correctly. Frontend reducer properly handles session_name_update events.

issues.description: LLM provider instantiation code in _infer_session_name is duplicated almost verbatim in _call_summarization_llm. This ~30-line block (provider selection, model instantiation) should be extracted into a shared helper method on ActiveSession.
issues.suggestion: Extract a _get_llm_agent() method that returns a configured pydantic_ai.Agent based on self.config.model_provider

testCoverage.notes: 16 backend tests covering trigger logic, DB persistence, WS events, user rename blocking, re-evaluation, edge cases. 2 frontend reducer tests. Comprehensive.
